title: Stepping over the line they couldn't cross
subtitle: A visualisation for choosing a different financial future from the one the family expected.
excerpt: A ten-minute visualisation for when the inherited belief that getting ahead isn't possible is sitting heavy. The image gives you a specific line to step over — the point where the family pattern stops and your own story begins.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education, developed alongside the generational pattern work in Week 2 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Uses visualisation as a forward-anchor technique in the public-domain tradition.

practice.whenToUse: Use after doing tapping or journalling on the 'we never get ahead' belief, to close with a forward-looking image.

content.text: A ten-minute visualisation for when the inherited belief has been named and you are ready to place yourself on the other side of it. The image is a specific line. You step over it.
Sit comfortably, eyes closed. Three slow breaths.
Picture a path in front of you. It runs flat and straight. At some point on the path there is a line on the ground. Not a wall, not a barrier. Just a line. A mark.

This is where the family pattern ends. Before the line is the inherited story: we work hard, it stays hard, getting ahead doesn't happen for us. Behind you on the path is everyone who held that belief and couldn't step past this point.
Stand in front of the line. Look down at it. Notice if there's any pull to stay on the near side — the familiar side, the side where the old story is safe.
Now step over it. One step. You're on the other side. The path continues forward. Nothing dramatic happens. The light is the same. But the line is behind you.
Walk forward for a few paces in the image. Notice what the path looks like from here. It may feel unfamiliar. That's correct. Unfamiliar is where the new pattern starts.
When you're ready, open your eyes and write one sentence: what gets possible now that you're on the other side.

Original to homemade.education, developed alongside the generational pattern work in Week 2 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Forward-anchor visualisation is a technique from the public-domain coaching and contemplative tradition.
